scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node-module.mjs node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build
scripts.typecheck: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node-module.mjs node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node-module.mjs node_modules/eslint/bin/eslint.js src scripts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts --ext ts,tsx,mjs --max-warnings 0
scripts.test: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node-module.mjs node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run
scripts.smoke: node scripts/ensure-supported-node.mjs && node scripts/run-local-node-module.mjs node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run src/app/router.smoke.test.tsx
